summary: P1 features (Password Recovery + Notifications) tested successfully. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All P1 features working correctly.

integration_issues.issue: Daily Bonus modal appears after login/registration and blocks interaction until dismissed (Escape key or Claim Bonus)
affected_selectors: DialogOverlay intercepts clicks on notification bell and other elements
integration_issues.note: Known issue from iteration_4 - working as designed, just needs UX consideration

passed_tests: Backend: /api/health returns ok
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password generates token for existing email
Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password returns null token for non-existent email (security)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with valid token succeeds
Backend: Login with new password after reset works
Backend: Login with old password after reset fails (401)
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with invalid token returns 400
Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password with short password (<6 chars) returns 400
Backend: Reset token can only be used once
Backend: GET /api/notifications returns list (requires auth)
Backend: GET /api/notifications unauthenticated returns 401
Backend: GET /api/notifications/unread-count returns count
Backend: POST /api/notifications/read marks all as read
Backend: Unread count is 0 after marking all read
Backend: PUT /api/auth/change-password with correct current password succeeds
Backend: PUT /api/auth/change-password with wrong current password returns 400
Backend: PUT /api/auth/change-password with short new password returns 400
Backend: Socket.IO endpoint /socket.io/ is reachable
Frontend: Login page loads with 'Forgot password?' link (data-testid='forgot-password-link')
Frontend: /forgot-password page renders correctly with email input and submit button
Frontend: Forgot password form submission shows token display step
Frontend: Token display shows copy button and 'Enter Reset Token' proceed button
Frontend: Notification bell visible in navbar for logged-in users (data-testid='notification-bell')
Frontend: Notification dropdown opens when clicking bell (data-testid='notification-dropdown')
Frontend: Dropdown shows 'Notifications' header and 'No notifications yet' for new user
Frontend: Theme toggle still works (dark -> light theme switch)
critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection shows 'closed before established' warning in console - Socket.IO falls back to polling transport which is acceptable
Console warnings about 404 for some resources (non-critical - likely favicon or assets)
test_credentials: Register new user: POST /api/auth/register {username, email, password}
seed_data_creation: None required - used dynamically created test users
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features (password recovery + notifications) fully working. Password recovery flow: POST /forgot-password (returns token in demo mode) -> POST /reset-password (with token + new_password) -> login with new password works. Notifications: GET /notifications, GET /notifications/unread-count, POST /notifications/read all working. Notification bell data-testid='notification-bell', dropdown data-testid='notification-dropdown'. Socket.IO WebSocket may show connection warnings but falls back to polling. Daily Bonus modal appears after login - dismiss with Escape key or Claim Bonus button.

password_recovery_api.forgot_password: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - generates token for existing email, null for non-existent (security)
password_recovery_api.reset_password: POST /api/auth/reset-password - validates token, expires after use, enforces 6+ char password

notifications_api.get_notifications: GET /api/notifications - returns list for authenticated user

frontend_password_recovery.forgot_password_page: Renders at /forgot-password with form (email input, submit button)
frontend_password_recovery.token_display: Shows generated token for demo mode with copy button
frontend_password_recovery.reset_form: Token input + new password input + submit button

frontend_notifications.notification_bell: Visible in navbar for authenticated users
frontend_notifications.notification_dropdown: Opens on click, shows 'Notifications' header, empty state message

features_verified.theme_toggle: Still working - toggles between dark and light themes
